src/index.ts.summary: Root public barrel; re-exports the entire library surface (schema builders + `s`/`schema`, all schema classes/types, table/entity actions, errors, transformers).
src/index.ts.inputs: Named re-exports from schema/, table/, entity/, errors/, transformers/ subtrees.
src/index.ts.outputs: The package's public API (values and types) consumed by library users.
src/index.ts.should: Aggregate and rename public exports; keep the surface stable.
src/index.ts.shouldNot: Contain logic, define types, or import internal-only helpers.

src/errors/index.ts.summary: Barrel exposing the single runtime error class used across the library.

src/schema/index.ts.summary: Schema subsystem barrel; re-exports all type builders and defines the `schema`/`s` object aggregating typers (any, nul, boolean, number, string, binary, set, list, map, record, anyOf, item).
src/schema/index.ts.inputs: Each type's typer function and its index barrel; SchemaAction.
src/schema/index.ts.outputs: All schema classes/types, `schema` object, alias `s`, SchemaAction.
src/schema/index.ts.should: Provide the single entry point for building schemas; assemble the typer registry.

src/schema/schema.ts.summary: Defines SchemaAction, the abstract base class all schema actions (Parser, Formatter, Finder, etc.) extend, holding a reference to their target schema.
src/schema/schema.ts.outputs: SchemaAction base class with static actionName and readonly schema.
src/schema/schema.ts.should: Bind an action to a schema; expose actionName slot.

src/schema/errors.ts.summary: Type-only union aggregating every schema-related error blueprint (primitive, set, list, map, record, anyOf, shared, item, actions) into SchemaErrorBlueprints.
src/schema/errors.ts.inputs: ErrorBlueprint unions from each schema type's errors module.
src/schema/errors.ts.should: Centralize the schema error type surface for DynamoDBToolboxError typing.

src/schema/types/index.ts.summary: Barrel for shared schema type utilities: value derivations (Input/Valid/Transformed/Formatted/Decoded), options, extension parser symbols, paths, schema unions, props.

src/schema/types/schema.ts.summary: Defines the Schema and Schema_ discriminated unions over all concrete schema classes (frozen and warm/builder variants).
src/schema/types/schema.ts.should: Provide the canonical 'any schema' type used everywhere.

src/schema/types/attribute.ts.summary: Type machinery for extended vs unextended runtime values per schema type; ExtendedValue resolves an Extension for a given type, and Schema{Un}extendedValue recursively describe possible JS values.
src/schema/types/attribute.ts.inputs: Resolved primitive schema types; Extension type.
src/schema/types/attribute.ts.should: Model the shape of parsed values including user extensions.

src/schema/types/schemaProps.ts.summary: Defines SchemaProps (the shared prop bag: required/hidden/key/savedAs/defaults/links/validators) and the required-tag literals Never/AtLeastOnce/Always plus SchemaRequiredProp.
src/schema/types/schemaProps.ts.should: Be the single source of truth for common attribute props.
src/schema/types/schemaProps.ts.shouldNot: Add type-specific props (enum/big/partial live in per-type props).

src/schema/types/options.ts.summary: Write/read option types: WriteMode ('key'|'put'|'update'), WriteValueOptions, ReadValueOptions, and SchemaExtendedWriteValue helper.
src/schema/types/options.ts.should: Parameterize value-derivation types by mode/extension/attribute selection.

src/schema/types/validator.ts.summary: Defines the Validator functional type: (input, schema) => boolean | string.
src/schema/types/validator.ts.inputs: Generic INPUT and SCHEMA type params.

src/schema/types/inputValue.ts.summary: Recursive type deriving the raw user INPUT accepted by a schema (before defaults/links fill), keyed on mode/required/key/default props to decide which keys are optional.
src/schema/types/inputValue.ts.outputs: InputValue<SCHEMA, OPTIONS> and internal MustBeProvided/OptionalKeys helpers.
src/schema/types/inputValue.ts.should: Model the permissive write input surface.
src/schema/types/inputValue.ts.shouldNot: Emit runtime code; conflate with post-fill ValidValue.

src/schema/types/validValue.ts.summary: Recursive type for a schema's VALID (post-fill, pre-transform) value; MustBeDefined governs optionality by mode and required prop.
src/schema/types/validValue.ts.should: Model the validated in-memory value shape.

src/schema/types/transformedValue.ts.summary: Recursive type for the DB-facing transformed value: applies savedAs key renaming and transformer output types.
src/schema/types/transformedValue.ts.should: Model the value as stored in DynamoDB (renamed keys, transformed primitives).

src/schema/types/formattedValue.ts.summary: Recursive type for values returned to users after read: hides hidden attributes, supports attribute-path selection and partial reads.
src/schema/types/formattedValue.ts.should: Model the public read shape with hidden-field omission and projection.

src/schema/types/decodedValue.ts.summary: Recursive type for decoded values (post-transform-reversal, before hiding hidden fields) — like FormattedValue but retains hidden attributes.
src/schema/types/decodedValue.ts.should: Model the intermediate read shape prior to hiding.

src/schema/types/extensionParser.ts.summary: Declares $extension/$contextExtension symbols and the ExtensionParser generator-function type used to plug custom write-value extensions (e.g. update ops) into parsing.
src/schema/types/extensionParser.ts.should: Define the contract parsers use to intercept extended inputs.

src/schema/types/paths.ts.summary: Type-level derivation of all valid attribute path strings for a schema (dot and bracket notation), with escaping of special chars.
src/schema/types/paths.ts.should: Enumerate legal projection/condition path strings per schema shape.

src/schema/types/pathUtils.ts.summary: Type helpers MatchKeys and ChildPaths that, given attribute keys and selected path strings, compute which keys match and the remaining child path suffixes.

src/schema/any/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the 'any' schema type: AnySchema class, any typer, AnySchema_ builder, ResolveAnySchema, AnySchemaProps.

src/schema/any/schema.ts.summary: AnySchema class (type:'any'); stores props, exposes checked getter and check() that validates shared props then freezes props.
src/schema/any/schema.ts.should: Represent an unconstrained attribute; validate/freeze on check.
src/schema/any/schema.ts.side: check() throws DynamoDBToolboxError on bad props; freezes props (mutation).

src/schema/any/schema_.ts.summary: Warm builder AnySchema_ (extends AnySchema) plus the `any` typer; fluent immutable methods (required, optional, hidden, key, savedAs, castAs, defaults, links, validators, transform, clone, build) each returning a new cloned instance.
src/schema/any/schema_.ts.should: Provide a chainable, immutable schema-definition DSL for any-type.
src/schema/any/schema_.ts.shouldNot: Mutate existing instances (uses overwrite to clone).
src/schema/any/schema_.ts.side: constructs new instances; no external effects

src/schema/any/resolve.ts.summary: Type ResolveAnySchema<S> = S['props']['castAs'] — resolves an any-schema's TS value type to its castAs override.
src/schema/any/resolve.ts.should: Map any-schema to its user-cast value type.

src/schema/any/types.ts.summary: AnySchemaProps interface extending SchemaProps with castAs (unknown) and transform.

src/schema/null/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the 'null' schema type: NullSchema, nul typer, NullSchema_, ResolvedNullSchema, NullSchemaProps.

src/schema/null/schema.ts.summary: NullSchema class (type:'null'); check() runs checkPrimitiveSchema then freezes props.
src/schema/null/schema.ts.side: check() throws on bad props; freezes props.

src/schema/null/schema_.ts.summary: Warm builder NullSchema_ and `nul` typer; fluent immutable prop methods returning cloned instances (mirrors the primitive builder pattern).

src/schema/null/resolve.ts.summary: Exports ResolvedNullSchema (the resolved TS value type null for null schemas).

src/schema/null/types.ts.summary: NullSchemaProps extending SchemaProps with enum (null[]) and transform.

src/schema/boolean/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the 'boolean' schema type: BooleanSchema, boolean typer, BooleanSchema_, resolve types, BooleanSchemaProps.

src/schema/boolean/schema.ts.summary: BooleanSchema class (type:'boolean'); check() runs checkPrimitiveSchema then freezes props.
src/schema/boolean/schema.ts.side: check() throws on bad props; freezes props.

src/schema/boolean/resolve.ts.summary: ResolveBooleanSchema<S> narrows to the enum union when props.enum is boolean[], else boolean; plus ResolvedBooleanSchema.
src/schema/boolean/resolve.ts.should: Resolve boolean schema to its TS value type.

src/schema/boolean/types.ts.summary: BooleanSchemaProps extending SchemaProps with enum (boolean[]) and transform.

src/schema/number/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the 'number' schema type: NumberSchema, number typer, NumberSchema_, resolve types, NumberSchemaProps.

src/schema/number/schema.ts.summary: NumberSchema class (type:'number'); check() runs checkPrimitiveSchema, additionally validates the `big` prop is boolean, then freezes props.
src/schema/number/schema.ts.should: Represent a number/bigint attribute; enforce big is boolean.
src/schema/number/schema.ts.side: check() throws DynamoDBToolboxError on bad props; freezes props.

src/schema/number/schema_.ts.summary: Warm builder NumberSchema_ and `number` typer; fluent immutable methods (required/hidden/key/savedAs/enum/const/big/defaults/links/validators/transform/clone/build) returning cloned instances.
src/schema/number/schema_.ts.inputs: Optional props (enum excluded from input, set via method).

src/schema/number/resolve.ts.summary: ResolveNumberSchema<S> narrows to enum union when props.enum is (number|bigint)[], else number | (bigint when big:true).
src/schema/number/resolve.ts.should: Resolve number schema to its TS value type.

src/schema/number/types.ts.summary: NumberSchemaProps extending SchemaProps with big (boolean), enum ((number|bigint)[]) and transform.

src/schema/string/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the 'string' schema type: StringSchema, string typer, StringSchema_, resolve types, StringSchemaProps.

src/schema/string/schema.ts.summary: StringSchema class (type:'string'); check() runs checkPrimitiveSchema then freezes props.
src/schema/string/schema.ts.side: check() throws on bad props; freezes props.

src/schema/string/schema_.ts.summary: Warm builder StringSchema_ and `string` typer — the canonical primitive builder; each fluent method (required/optional/hidden/key/savedAs/enum/const/transform/keyDefault/putDefault/updateDefault/default/keyLink/putLink/updateLink/link/validators/clone/build) returns a new cloned instance via overwrite.
src/schema/string/schema_.ts.should: Chainable immutable string-schema DSL; branch key vs put for default/link/validate.
src/schema/string/schema_.ts.side: constructs new instances; imports entity update types (noted circular debt)

src/schema/string/resolve.ts.summary: ResolveStringSchema<S> narrows to enum union when props.enum is string[], else string; plus ResolvedStringSchema.
src/schema/string/resolve.ts.should: Resolve string schema to its TS value type.

src/schema/string/types.ts.summary: StringSchemaProps extending SchemaProps with enum (string[]) and transform.

src/schema/binary/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the 'binary' schema type: BinarySchema, binary typer, BinarySchema_, resolve types, BinarySchemaProps.

src/schema/binary/schema.ts.summary: BinarySchema class (type:'binary'); check() runs checkPrimitiveSchema then freezes props.
src/schema/binary/schema.ts.side: check() throws on bad props; freezes props.

src/schema/binary/resolve.ts.summary: ResolveBinarySchema<S> narrows to enum union when props.enum is Uint8Array[], else Uint8Array; plus ResolvedBinarySchema.
src/schema/binary/resolve.ts.should: Resolve binary schema to its TS value type.

src/schema/binary/types.ts.summary: BinarySchemaProps extending SchemaProps with enum (Uint8Array[]) and transform.

src/schema/primitive/index.ts.summary: Type-only barrel exporting the aggregate primitive unions PrimitiveSchema, PrimitiveSchema_, ResolvePrimitiveSchema, ResolvedPrimitiveSchema.

src/schema/primitive/types.ts.summary: Defines PrimitiveSchema/PrimitiveSchema_ unions (null|boolean|number|string|binary) and Resolve(d)PrimitiveSchema mapping each to its value type.
src/schema/primitive/types.ts.should: Group the five primitives for shared handling.

src/schema/primitive/check.ts.summary: checkPrimitiveSchema(schema, path): shared runtime validation for all primitives — validates shared props, then that every enum value has the correct primitive type, and that static defaults are the right type and within enum range.
src/schema/primitive/check.ts.inputs: A PrimitiveSchema and optional path string.
src/schema/primitive/check.ts.should: Enforce enum/default type and range invariants.
src/schema/primitive/check.ts.shouldNot: Freeze props (callers freeze); validate composite schemas.

src/schema/set/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the 'set' schema type: SetSchema, set typer, SetSchema_, SetElementSchema.

src/schema/set/schema.ts.summary: SetSchema class (type:'set') wrapping one element schema; check() validates shared props and that elements are required, not hidden, not renamed (savedAs), and have no default/link, then recurses into the element and freezes.
src/schema/set/schema.ts.should: Enforce set-element constraints; cascade check to element.
src/schema/set/schema.ts.side: check() throws DynamoDBToolboxError; freezes props and elements.

src/schema/set/schema_.ts.summary: Warm builder SetSchema_ and `set` typer; takes a lightened element schema and exposes the fluent immutable prop DSL.
src/schema/set/schema_.ts.inputs: An element schema (number/string/binary) and optional props.
src/schema/set/schema_.ts.should: Build set schemas immutably; light() the element.

src/schema/set/types.ts.summary: SetElementSchema type: number/string/binary schema whose props are constrained (required atLeastOnce, not hidden, no savedAs/defaults/links).
src/schema/set/types.ts.should: Constrain legal set element shapes at the type level.

src/schema/list/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the 'list' schema type: ListSchema, list typer, ListSchema_, ListElementSchema.

src/schema/list/schema.ts.summary: ListSchema class (type:'list') wrapping one element schema; check() validates shared props and that the element is required, not hidden, not renamed, and undefaulted, then recurses (path '[n]') and freezes.
src/schema/list/schema.ts.side: check() throws DynamoDBToolboxError; freezes props and element.

src/schema/list/schema_.ts.summary: Warm builder ListSchema_ and `list` typer; takes a lightened element schema and exposes the fluent immutable prop DSL.
src/schema/list/schema_.ts.inputs: An element schema and optional props.

src/schema/list/types.ts.summary: ListElementSchema type: any Schema whose props are constrained to a required, non-hidden, non-renamed, undefaulted element.

src/schema/map/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the 'map' schema type: MapSchema, map typer, MapSchema_, MapAttributes.

src/schema/map/schema.ts.summary: MapSchema class (type:'map') over named attributes; constructor precomputes key/saved/required attribute-name sets. check() validates shared props, detects duplicate savedAs, recomputes sets, cascades check to each attribute, then freezes.
src/schema/map/schema.ts.should: Model a fixed-shape nested object; enforce unique savedAs.
src/schema/map/schema.ts.shouldNot: Allow two attributes sharing a savedAs.

src/schema/map/schema_.ts.summary: Warm builder MapSchema_ and `map` typer; takes an attributes object (lightObj-normalized) and exposes the fluent immutable prop DSL.

src/schema/map/types.ts.summary: MapAttributes interface: string-keyed record of Schema.
src/schema/map/types.ts.should: Type the attributes bag of a map.

src/schema/record/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the 'record' schema type: RecordSchema, record typer, RecordSchema_, RecordSchemaProps, RecordKeySchema, RecordElementSchema.

src/schema/record/schema.ts.summary: RecordSchema class (type:'record') with keys+elements schemas; check() validates shared props, the `partial` boolean prop, that keys are a string schema and that both keys and elements are required, non-hidden, non-key, non-renamed, undefaulted, then cascades and freezes.
src/schema/record/schema.ts.inputs: A key StringSchema, an element Schema, RecordSchemaProps.
src/schema/record/schema.ts.should: Model an open-ended string-keyed map; enforce key/element constraints.
src/schema/record/schema.ts.shouldNot: Allow non-string keys or defaulted/renamed keys/elements.

src/schema/record/schema_.ts.summary: Warm builder RecordSchema_ and `record` typer; takes lightened key and element schemas plus the fluent immutable prop DSL (incl. partial).
src/schema/record/schema_.ts.inputs: Key schema, element schema, optional props.

src/schema/record/types.ts.summary: RecordSchemaProps (adds partial) and the constrained RecordKeySchema/RecordElementSchema types (required, non-hidden, non-key, non-renamed, undefaulted).
src/schema/record/types.ts.should: Type record props and constrain key/element shapes.

src/schema/anyOf/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the 'anyOf' (union) schema type: AnyOfSchema, anyOf typer, AnyOfSchema_, AnyOfSchemaProps, AnyOfElementSchema.

src/schema/anyOf/schema.ts.summary: AnyOfSchema class (type:'anyOf') over an elements array; lazily computes discriminators (shared string-enum attrs) and discriminations (enum-value->element map). check() validates the array is non-empty and each element is required/non-hidden/non-renamed/undefaulted and the discriminator prop is valid, then cascades and freezes. match(value) resolves the element schema for a discriminator value.
src/schema/anyOf/schema.ts.should: Model a tagged/untagged union; support discriminated matching.
src/schema/anyOf/schema.ts.shouldNot: Allow zero elements or defaulted/renamed elements.
src/schema/anyOf/schema.ts.side: check() throws DynamoDBToolboxError; freezes; memoizes computed maps into symbol-keyed fields.

src/schema/anyOf/schema_.ts.summary: Warm builder AnyOfSchema_ and `anyOf` variadic typer; takes lightened element schemas and exposes the fluent immutable prop DSL (incl. discriminate).

src/schema/anyOf/types.ts.summary: Type-level Discriminator derivation across union elements (intersecting per-element string-enum discriminator keys), AnyOfSchemaProps (discriminator?), and constrained AnyOfElementSchema.
src/schema/anyOf/types.ts.should: Type valid discriminator keys and element shapes.

src/schema/anyOf/constants.ts.summary: Declares the internal symbols $discriminators_, $discriminators, $discriminations_, $computed used by AnyOfSchema to memoize discriminator computation.
src/schema/anyOf/constants.ts.should: Provide stable private keys for anyOf memoization.

src/schema/item/index.ts.summary: Barrel for the top-level 'item' schema type: ItemSchema, item typer, ItemSchema_, ItemAttributes.

src/schema/item/schema.ts.summary: ItemSchema class (type:'item') — the root schema of an entity, like MapSchema but props are fixed to {}; constructor precomputes key/saved/required name sets, check() validates props, detects duplicate savedAs, cascades check, then freezes.
src/schema/item/schema.ts.should: Model the entity's top-level item; enforce unique savedAs.

src/schema/item/schema_.ts.summary: Warm builder ItemSchema_ and `item` typer; takes an attributes object (lightObj-normalized). Root builder, so exposes fewer prop methods than nested types.
src/schema/item/schema_.ts.should: Build the root item schema immutably.

src/schema/item/types.ts.summary: ItemAttributes interface: string-keyed record of Schema (the entity's attributes bag).

src/schema/utils/checkSchemaProps.ts.summary: checkSchemaProps(props, path): validates the shared props common to all schemas — required is one of the allowed tags, hidden/key are booleans, savedAs is a string.
src/schema/utils/checkSchemaProps.ts.inputs: A SchemaProps bag and optional path.
src/schema/utils/checkSchemaProps.ts.should: Enforce shared prop-type invariants for every schema's check().

src/schema/utils/hasDefinedDefault.ts.summary: hasDefinedDefault(schema): true if any of keyDefault/putDefault/updateDefault/keyLink/putLink/updateLink is defined.
src/schema/utils/hasDefinedDefault.ts.should: Detect whether a schema carries any default or link (used to reject defaulted elements).

src/schema/utils/isDynamicDefault.ts.summary: isDynamicDefault(value): type-guard true when the default value is a function (a getter).
src/schema/utils/isDynamicDefault.ts.should: Distinguish computed defaults from static ones.

src/schema/utils/isStaticDefault.ts.summary: isStaticDefault(value): type-guard true when the default is not a function (a literal value).

src/schema/utils/light.ts.summary: Light<S> type + light/lightTuple/lightObj identity casters that strip a warm schema's builder methods to its base class, avoiding heavy type computes when passing schemas into typers.
src/schema/utils/light.ts.inputs: A schema / tuple / object of schemas.
src/schema/utils/light.ts.outputs: Same value typed as the lightened base schema(s).
src/schema/utils/light.ts.should: Reduce type-instantiation cost for large schemas.
